title: Elbow Grease Squirt & Mop Floor Cleaner | Direct to Floor Cleaning | Suitable for Tiles, Laminate & Vinyl Flooring (Lemon, 1L)
features: QUICK & EASY APPLICATION: Simply squirt the cleaning spray straight onto the floor – no mixing, no bucket, no hassle. It’s ideal for busy mornings or quick evening refreshes when time is short.

TWO ZESTY SCENTS: Choose between Lemon Fresh for a classic clean or Orange Splash for a fruity twist. Each fragrance leaves a fresh, uplifting scent after cleaning, ideal for kitchens, bathrooms or living areas.
MULTI-FLOOR FRIENDLY: The Lemon Fresh formula works beautifully on tiles, laminate and vinyl, while Orange Splash is gentle enough for wooden floors. Use it throughout the home with confidence.
POWERFUL PERFORMANCE: This floor cleaner delivers impressive results without harsh scrubbing. Great for cleaning up muddy footprints, kitchen spills, or sticky messes left by kids and pets.
IDEAL FOR DAILY USE: Safe and effective for regular mopping, helping maintain clean floors without wearing down surfaces. It’s perfect for morning routines or post-dinner clean-ups.
ELIMINATES ODOURS: Not only does it clean, but it also helps to neutralise unpleasant smells. Use in high-traffic areas like hallways, entrances and kitchens for a consistently fresh feel.
PART OF YOUR ESSENTIAL CLEANING TOOLS: This spray pairs well with any mop and makes an easy addition to your everyday cleaning supplies. Keep it under the sink and grab it when needed.
SHINY FLOORS, NO RESIDUE: Leaves floors looking fresh and polished without streaks or sticky patches. It’s especially handy for laminate or wooden floor areas where residue build-up is common.
A MODERN TAKE ON FLOOR CLEANING: This squirt and mop solution brings convenience and performance together – perfect for modern households.
THE ONLY CLEANER YOU'LL NEED: With its versatility and strong cleaning power, this is more than just a laminate floor cleaner – it’s a must-have surface cleaner for every room.
description: Product Description Make everyday cleaning feel effortless with the Elbow Grease Squirt & Mop Floor Cleaner. Designed to deliver powerful results with minimal effort, this ready-to-use floor cleaning spray is perfect for busy households that demand spotless floors without the faff. Whether it's sticky spills in the kitchen, muddy footprints in the hallway, or general daily dust and dirt, this versatile floor cleaner cuts through grime with ease. With two uplifting scents – Lemon Fresh and Orange Splash – it leaves rooms smelling as clean as they look. Use the Lemon Fresh formula on tiles, laminate and vinyl, while Orange Splash is specially made for wooden floors as well as laminate and vinyl. No buckets, no mixing – just squirt and mop for sparkling results. With this bottle in the cupboard, there’s no need for endless cleaning supplies – it’s the only floor cleaner you'll ever need. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Parfum, Limonene, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone. Directions Simply spray Elbow Grease Squirt & Mop Floor Cleaner directly onto the floor and mop. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. 151 Products (Ireland), Block 3, Harcourt Centre, Harcourt Road, Dublin 2, D02 A339, Ireland.
